name: Franchise Architect: Football
currentFocus: Session 48 shipped one injury/recovery authority with Rehab Command plans, secure memory-only Gist credential custody and integrity verification, lifecycle coherence/doctor guards, bounded offseason roster progress, and authority-preserving server transport.
nextMilestone: Produce a real received-message receipt proving football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwards/copies to Studio operations, then reconcile the authoritative SPARKED registry value with the local FORGE evidence contract.
blockers: Launch/SPARKED remains evidence-gated until football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwarding/copying is verified with a real received-message receipt and current live origin/routing proves playfranchisearchitect.com serves the latest build.

testSuiteStatus.coverage: Session 48 verified the final tree with direct shards 358/358 (core 64/64, runtime 175/175, sim-contract 68/68, sim-realism 1/1, long 3/3, studio 47/47), Playwright UI 18/18, Pages build/smoke, live routes 8/8, sitemap 10/10, secret scan 0, canon conformance 0 gaps, and doctor blockingFailing 0.
testSuiteStatus.uiSuiteNote: Session 48 Playwright passed 18/18 after trace-driven authority-fallback repair and a bye-aware box-score contract.

highlights: Priority Inbox (CRITICAL/IMPORTANT/FLAVOR tiers, bell badge, slide-in drawer)
Live Sim-Watch overlay (300ms animated drive log, key play cards)
Franchise Moment card (cinematic post-game drama + share button)
GM Decision modal (pre-advance choices on critical weeks)
Cap War Room (4-year visual cap timeline, color-coded risk zones)
Trade Breakdown card (A-F letter grades, fairness verdict)
Season Narrative Arcs (3 dynamic story threads per season)
GM Persona progress bar + confetti tier-up burst
SimJob TTL cleanup (10-min eviction, prevents OOM)
5 new API endpoints (season-arcs, gm-decision, records/franchise, team-archetypes, franchise-moment)
Mobile 375px overflow fixes across all new modals

timedOut: One runtime-shard wrapper exceeded the shell timeout while its child remained active; it was terminated and the shard was rerun through a direct exit ledger, passing 175/175.

freeTierAuditNote: Verified S138 #753: pure browser game, no LLM/email/per-user backend calls. Static deploy.
